channel.title: GitHub Blade Daily Trending
channel.description: Daily Trending of Blade in GitHub

item.title: grocy/grocy
item.description: ERP beyond your fridge - Grocy is a web-based self-hosted groceries & household management solution for your home

item.title: krayin/laravel-crm
item.description: Free & Opensource Laravel CRM solution for SMEs and Enterprises for complete customer lifecycle management.

item.title: laravel-frontend-presets/tall
item.description: A TALL (Tailwind CSS, Alpine.js, Laravel and Livewire) Preset for Laravel

item.title: lsky-org/lsky-pro
item.description: ☁️兰空图床(Lsky Pro) - Your photo album on the cloud.
